code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut sorted = true
  mut have_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1

  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end

    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

    if is_ws
      if in_num
        let val = cur * sign
        if have_prev
          if val < prev
            sorted = false
          end
        end
        prev = val
        have_prev = true
        in_num = false
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
      end
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43
      in_num = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if in_num
    let val = cur * sign
    if have_prev
      if val < prev
        sorted = false
      end
    end
    prev = val
    have_prev = true
  end

  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
